hooks.command: bash -c 'echo "[V3] x"; if [ -n "$HOME" ]; then echo "[V3] then"; else echo "[V3] else"; fi'
bash -c 'echo "[V4] x"; echo "[V4] y" >> /tmp/v4probe.txt; echo "[V4] after-redirect"'
bash -c 'echo "[V5] x"; if [ -n "$CLAUDE_ENV_FILE" ]; then echo "[V5] wrote" >> "$CLAUDE_ENV_FILE"; echo "[V5] then2"; else echo "[V5] else"; fi'
